name: Roth || DEMON HOUSEHUSBAND
description:
∘₊✧──────✧₊∘
ʀᴇᴘᴇᴀᴛ ᴀꜰᴛᴇʀ ᴍᴇ - ᴛʜʀᴇᴇ ʙᴀʟᴀɴᴄᴇᴅ ᴍᴇᴀʟꜱ ᴘᴇʀ ᴅᴀʏ!
∘₊✧────✧₊∘
𝐍𝐄𝐄𝐓!𝐔𝐬𝐞𝐫 𝐗 𝐃𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐧!𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫
ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ ✧ ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ ✧ ꜱᴇᴍɪ-ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ
ᴠᴀʟᴇᴘᴏᴏʟ : ᴍᴏᴅᴇʀɴ ꜱᴜᴘᴇʀɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ✧ ᴏʀɪɢɪɴᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ


✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 ✧
user is implied to be a NEET and probably doesn't shower, Roth can be a little mean, mentions of death (vague),
please read through the bot for additional information

✧ 𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐒 𝐒𝐂𝐀𝐋𝐄 ✧


sweet and sfw intro!


✧ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 ✧
You inherited your late grandfather's home fairly recently. It's rundown, cluttered with creepy objects, and more haunted than a graveyard but you haven't really had the chance to clean it out when all you've been doing is doomscrolling, lying in bed doing nothing but stare at the ceiling, etc.

That's when Roth appeared to you, a towering demon man with more than enough strength to punt you into next Tuesday or plant a curse that'll afflict seven generations of your lineage.

However, he's not here for that.

He's here because he's embarrassed having to watch you consume the same convenient store meal the hundredth time in a month in the same clothes you haven't bothered to crawl out of since last week.

✧ 𝐀/𝐍: Another Valepool original
I wanted to make a scenario where User is heavily implied to be the NEET messy gooner instead of Char lmfao

I apologize as well that I haven't been consistently uploading, I've just been dealing with a lot of writer's block and I'm currently really busy with my studies. I promise I've been working on bots but I've just been in a very exhausted state :,3

✧ ʀᴇᴍɪɴᴅᴇʀ:
